description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: SPK Company Ltd transferred 918,760,451 SPK tokens from the SPK Company Ltd account to the Spark SubProxy Account. The SPK Company Ltd account is specified in [A.6.1.1.1.2.1.4.2.1.2.1 - Minting Of Tokens To SPK Company Ltd](8b3b46b1-e16a-4d1a-b4d0-52b4cc01ca4f).
The Spark SubProxy Account is specified in [A.6.1.1.1.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account](378950e0-85c9-4f12-94cd-fb36cde59ba9).
